title: Hello, i'm Ruth.
Subtitle: Data Analyst
about_me_: I transform complex data into strategic decisions
about_me_profile_text: Data Analyst with solid experience in ETL processes, dynamic dashboard creation, and database management using DDL and DML, designing performance KPIs to evaluate operational performance. My focus is on transforming complex data into strategic information that drives organizational growth. With a background in Software Development, I combine programming logic with statistical analysis to offer precise and scalable solutions.
about_me_excel_text: Macros, Pivot Tables, complex data analysis, and financial modeling.
about_me_sql_text: DML/DDL management, optimized queries, and data architecture.
about_me_powerbi_text: Real-time KPI dashboards, data visualization, and interactive report creation.
about_me_python_text: Large-scale data cleaning, task automation, and logic development.
about_me_vision_text: My driving force is constant evolution. I don't just seek to analyze data, but to master new technologies that allow me to predict the future of business. I am passionate about self-taught learning and my goal is to become a leader in Data Science, providing disruptive solutions that break with conventional norms in high-performance environments.
experience_data_analytics_detail: Specialized in KPI management and data transformation for strategic decision-making:
experience_data_analytics_tasks1: Management and monitoring of Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) and executive reports.
experience_data_analytics_tasks2: Exhaustive data cleaning and preparation processes (Data Wrangling).
experience_data_analytics_tasks3: Creation of dynamic dashboards for commercial metrics visualization.

experience_camara_qa_tasks1: Execution of exhaustive manual tests to verify system integrity.
experience_camara_qa_tasks2: Validation of software requirements and error detection in early stages.
experience_camara_qa_tasks3: Detailed documentation of test cases and technical manuals for internal systems.

experience_secret_tasks1: Administrative agenda management for the department manager.
experience_secret_tasks2: Control of institutional correspondence and drafting of official documents.

nota_text: This is an exercise to demonstrate my skills; the company and other data are entirely fictitious. The dashboard is only an image, so you will not be able to interact with it.
pgd_tasks: KPI Management, Reporting, Cleaning and Preparation (Data Wrangling)

prod_perf_intro: This project focuses on the analysis of individual product performance within a company, evaluating their sales, profit margins, and contribution to total revenue. The goal is to provide a clear view of which products are most profitable and which need attention, utilizing Power BI for detailed analysis.
prod_perf_demo_text: Here you can explore the interactive dashboard I developed. Use the "Product" and "Date" filters to segment the data and gain specific insights.
prod_perf_context_text: As a data analyst, my goal was to analyze product performance in terms of sales, profit margin, and contribution to total revenue. Two tables were used: Products (with Product_ID, Product_Name, Unit_Cost) and ProductSales (with Sale_ID, Date, Product_ID, Quantity, Sale_Price).
prod_perf_skill_1: Data Modeling and Relationships: Establishing relationships between tables for a cohesive analysis.
prod_perf_skill_2: Calculated Column Creation: Development of row-level metrics such as Total Revenue, Total Cost, and Profit Margin.
prod_perf_skill_3: DAX Aggregate Measure Calculation: Implementation of Total Revenues, Total Profit Margin, and Margin Percentage for performance summaries.
prod_perf_skill_4: Key Visualization Design: Creation of bar charts for revenue and margin per product, scatter plots to compare metrics, and detailed tables with conditional formatting to highlight performance.
prod_perf_skill_5: Slicer Implementation: Addition of filters by Product Name and Date for dynamic performance exploration.
prod_perf_footer: This analysis allows the company to identify high and low-performing products, facilitating strategic decisions on pricing, promotions, and inventory.
eco_intro: This project represents a 360-degree analysis of a large e-commerce platform's operations. My role was to build a comprehensive report to understand overall business performance, from product profitability to customer satisfaction and supply chain efficiency. The project integrates SQL Server for database management and Power BI for modeling, analysis, and visualization.
eco_demo_text: Here you can explore a glimpse of the different dashboard sections I developed. Use the buttons to navigate between the "Executive", "Products", and "Customers/Geography" views.
eco_context_text: As part of the data analysis team for a large e-commerce platform, the goal was to provide a 360-degree view of the business, covering performance, customer satisfaction, supply chain efficiency, and product profitability.
eco_skill_1: Database Design and Management (SQL Server): Creation of the `EcommerceDB` database and definition of table schemas (`Customers`, `Products`, `Orders`, `Order_Details`) with primary and foreign keys, ensuring referential integrity.
eco_skill_2: SQL View Optimization: Development of views like `Detailed_Sales_View` to simplify complex queries and optimize performance by combining information from multiple tables for Power BI analysis.
eco_skill_3: Data Transformation (Power Query): Data processing to ensure quality and proper formatting, including the addition of temporal columns for period-based analysis.
eco_skill_4: Calculated Columns and Advanced DAX Measures: Implementation of complex metrics to evaluate revenue, costs, and profit margins at the item and order level, as well as operational metrics (Total Units Sold, Total Orders, Average Order Value, Order Cancellation Rate) and customer metrics (Total Unique Customers, New Customers per Month/Year).
eco_skill_5: Multi-Page Dashboard Design in Power BI: Creation of an interactive report with multiple pages (Executive, Products, and Customers/Geography) for a holistic business view, featuring key metric cards, trend charts, distributions, and detailed tables.
eco_skill_6: Segmentation and Dynamic Interactions: Configuration of global slicers (Date, Product Category, Brand, Shipping Country, Customer Segment, Order Status) and adjustment of interactions between visualizations for dynamic analysis.
eco_footer: This report is a vital strategic tool that enables management to gain actionable insights into e-commerce performance, facilitating data-driven decisions to optimize profitability, operational efficiency, and customer satisfaction.
csat_intro: This project focuses on the analysis of customer satisfaction through survey data. The goal is to identify key factors influencing satisfaction and provide insights to improve service quality, using Power BI for data exploration and visualization.
csat_context_text: As a data analyst, my goal was to analyze customer satisfaction surveys to identify the main factors influencing their experience. The data comes from the CustomerSatisfaction table, including Survey_ID, Survey_Date, Region, Age, Gender, Service_Rating, Response_Time, Problem_Resolution, and Comments.
csat_skill_1: Data Exploration and Preparation: Initial analysis of data structure and rating distribution to identify patterns.
csat_skill_2: Calculated Column Creation: Definition of High_Satisfaction to categorize satisfaction levels.
csat_skill_3: Key DAX Measure Calculation: Implementation of Average Rating and High Satisfaction Percentage to quantify overall satisfaction.
csat_skill_4: Informative Visualization Design: Creation of bar charts for rating distribution and regional comparison, pie charts for satisfaction distribution, and tables to analyze the impact of response time and problem resolution.
csat_skill_5: Detailed Slicer Implementation: Addition of filters by Region, Age, Gender, Response Time, and Problem Resolution for multifaceted analysis.
csat_footer: This analysis provides the company with valuable insights to improve customer experience, optimize service processes, and direct efforts toward areas with the highest impact on satisfaction.
reg_sales_parag_1: In this project, I conducted a comprehensive analysis of sales performance by region for a retail company. The main objective was to identify patterns, trends, and growth opportunities in their operations. I used Power BI for data ingestion, transformation, and visualization.
reg_sales_demo_text: Here you can explore the interactive dashboard I developed. Use the "Category" and "Region" filters to see how the data and visualizations change.
reg_sales_context_text: As a data analyst at a retail company with stores in various regions, my task was to understand sales performance by region to identify trends and growth opportunities. The provided data included detailed sales information by `Sale_ID`, `Date`, `Region`, `City`, `Category`, `Product`, `Quantity`, and `Unit_Price`.
reg_sales_skill_1: Data Modeling: Preparation and structuring of sales data for efficient analysis in Power BI.
reg_sales_skill_2: DAX Measure Calculation: Creation of key measures such as Total Sales, Total Quantity Sold, and Average Sales to derive crucial business metrics.
reg_sales_skill_3: Interactive Visualization Design: Development of an intuitive dashboard with bar, line, and pie charts, along with tables and cards to present information clearly and actionably.
reg_sales_skill_4: Slicer Implementation: Integration of filters by Region, Category, and Date to allow users a dynamic and personalized exploration of the data.
reg_sales_footer: This analysis provided the company with crucial information for strategic decision-making, such as inventory optimization and the identification of high-performing markets.
